purpose: Canonical chart/data-visualization module contract for business dashboard and report pages.

barchart.allowed_when: Use BarChart for categorical comparisons, time buckets, progress against threshold, and business report summaries when chartData and xAxis contracts are present.

other_chart_types.allowed_when: Use static semantic fallback only when no local official chart docs or component contract exists for the requested visualization.

numeric_policy: Money values require currency and precision.
Quantity values require unit and precision.

required: accessibleDataTable or adjacent data table for exact values
legend or inline series labels unless there is only one series
accessibility_contract.empty_state: Charts with no data must show an empty state and must not render misleading zero-height bars as real data.

visual_policy: Default business charts must use Sanofi brand or data visualization tokens, not arbitrary green or raw colors.
Threshold lines require label, unit, and source.
Do not crop axis labels; use label rotation or table fallback when labels cannot fit.
Dashboard chart cards must expose title, filter context, last updated time, and data source.
